notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero reaches on a fielder's choice. Taylor Walls scores. Hunter Feduccia to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Nick Allen.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero reaches on a fielder's choice. Taylor Walls scores. Hunter Feduccia to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Nick Allen.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Christian Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo singles on a line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Jose Altuve scores. Isaac Paredes to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez homers (29) on a fly ball to center field. Jose Altuve scores.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade grounds into a double play, shortstop Nick Allen to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Cedric Mullins out at 2nd. Ryan Vilade out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca steals (8) 2nd base. Cedric Mullins steals (14) home.
